comment: Round 4 D3 latency-path derivations (L1, L3, L4) computed from with-ability runner output (Round 4 Edit A on with_ability_runner.py + Edit B on no_ability_runner.py + Edit C on aggregate_eval.py).

L1_wall_clock_p50.method: mean(latency_p50_s across with-ability rows); per-row latency_p50_s from runner-level percentile_p50 over per-prompt latencies
L1_wall_clock_p50.v1_baseline_pass: n/a (L1 has no §4.1 hard threshold; informational only)

L3_step_count.method: round(mean(step_count across with-ability rows)); per-case step_count = len(prompt_outcomes)
L3_step_count.v1_baseline_pass: n/a (L3 has no §4.1 hard threshold; integer >= 1 sanity check passes)
L3_step_count.real_llm_upgrade_path: Replace count-of-prompt_outcomes with count of mcp.method.name OTel events per invocation.

L4_redundant_call_ratio.method: mean(redundant_call_ratio across with-ability rows) clamped to [0,1]; per-case ratio = (total_calls - unique_call_names) / total_calls; tool_name = prompt_id
L4_redundant_call_ratio.v1_baseline_pass: n/a (L4 has no §4.1 hard threshold; in [0.0, 1.0] sanity check passes)

degenerate_path_acknowledgement.reason: Each prompt within a case has a unique prompt_id by construction in the deterministic runner, so total_calls (20) == unique_call_names (20), and ratio = 0.0.
degenerate_path_acknowledgement.ratio_zero_is_a_valid_value_not_a_sentin: Workspace rule 'No Silent Failures' is upheld because the aggregator distinguishes `None` (no rows carried the field) from `0.0` (rows present, no redundancy observed).

L4_redundant_call_ratio.real_llm_upgrade_path: Replace prompt_id with sanitized MCP tool-name + arg-hash; the aggregator schema does not change.

instrumentation_source: evals/si-chip/runners/with_ability_runner.py (Round 4 Edit A): percentile_p50 helper, step_count_from_outcomes helper, redundant_call_ratio_from_outcomes helper. Mirror plumbing in evals/si-chip/runners/no_ability_runner.py (Round 4 Edit B). Aggregator hoist in .agents/skills/si-chip/scripts/aggregate_eval.py (Round 4 Edit C): hoist_l1_wall_clock_p50, hoist_l3_step_count, hoist_l4_redundant_call_ratio.
